veh:jeep-renegade-2015-latitude.notes: 2.4L Tigershark MultiAir2 (sales code ED6/ED8/EDD/EDE range). In scope for Customer Satisfaction Notifications W80 (oil consumption inspection) and W84 (PCM reprogramming) — see known-campaigns.json.

veh:silverado-2500hd-2003.notes: Unleaded gasoline 6.0L V8 (Vortec 6000 / LQ4-class on GMT800). Confirm exact RPO from VIN/glovebox sticker when convenient. OBD protocol is typically ELM327 auto-detect on this era (often SAE J1850 VPW on GMT800 — do not hard-force CAN). Shares SAE-generic cartridges; OEM-specific depth lives in gm-vortec-6.0-stub once curated TSBs exist. Do not invent GM-enhanced fault classes.

fca-tigershark-2.4.label: FCA Tigershark 2.4L MultiAir2 (Jeep Renegade / Compass, Fiat 500X, Ram ProMaster City)

gm-vortec-6.0.label: GM Vortec 6.0L V8 (LQ4-class; e.g. 2003 Silverado 2500 HD gas)
